Package net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.provider

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CabinEditPlugin
    This is the central singleton for the Paxelerate edit plugin
    CabinEditPlugin.Implementation
    The actual implementation of the Eclipse Plugin
    CabinItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Cabin object
    CabinItemProviderAdapterFactory
    This is the factory that is used to provide the interfaces needed to support Viewers.
    CrewMemberItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a CrewMember object
    CurtainItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Curtain object
    DoorItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Door object
    GalleyItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Galley object
    LavatoryItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Lavatory object
    LuggagePropertiesItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a LuggageProperties object
    PassengerItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Passenger object
    PassengerPropertiesItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a PassengerProperties object
    PhysicalObjectItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a PhysicalObject object
    RowItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Row object
    SeatItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Seat object
    SimulationPropertiesItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a SimulationProperties object.
    SimulationResultItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a SimulationResult object
    StairwayItemProvider
    This is the item provider adapter for a Stairway object
    StowageItemProvider

    TravelClassItemProvider
